project.name: PhotoVerify
project.philosophy: Democratic Forensic Suite for individual creators. Sovereignty first: 100% local processing, no cloud dependency.
project.architecture: Capacitor 8 (React 19 + TypeScript 5) with Robust Java Native Bridge for SAF (Storage Access Framework).

scientific_layers.name: Invisible Stamp (LSB+)
scientific_layers.functional: Verbergt een unieke 6-cijferige code direct in de pixel-luminantie.
scientific_layers.technical: 4-bit differential encoding in de blauwe kanalen van de interior pixels. Stable against re-saves.
scientific_layers.logic: Enforced 6-character hex/numeric input; padded with zeros if necessary.

scientific_layers.name: Visual DNA (pHash)
scientific_layers.functional: Identificeert het 'concept' van de foto, ongeacht kleine wijzigingen.
scientific_layers.technical: DCT-based Perceptual Hashing (16x16 grid). Vergelijking via Hamming Distance.
scientific_layers.logic: Calculated on the cropped interior to ensure consistency with the stamped data.

scientific_layers.name: Physical Border (Geometric)
scientific_layers.functional: Gebruikt de exacte buitenste pixel-rand als fysieke puzzel-sleutel.
scientific_layers.technical: 1-pixel rand-extractie. Verificatie vereist pixel-perfecte match met 2% tolerantie for compressie/visual stamp.
scientific_layers.logic: Visual blue border drawn BEFORE extraction to ensure consistency between proof and certified image.

scientific_layers.name: Time-Anchor (Crypto)
scientific_layers.functional: Bewijst dat de foto op een specifiek moment bestond.
scientific_layers.technical: SHA-256 hash van de gestempelde foto gekoppeld aan een dagelijks publiek anker (Deed JSON).
scientific_layers.logic: Stored in deed.json; used to verify image integrity via SHA-256 comparison.

components.design: Solid background action cards (Green/Blue) met witte tekst (!important).
components.technical: App.tsx (Mode: START) + App.css (.card-action). Clear visual separation of Shield and Audit.

components.design: Toont missie, versie (v1.2.6) en build-codenaam (Joe_Sync). Nu inclusief gedetailleerde licentie-data.
components.technical: App.tsx (Mode: ABOUT/INFO). Geeft Device Owner (Native), Status, Expiratie, Klantgegevens en Grace Period weer.

components.design: Editbare URLs voor remote configs; Fetch/Update en Save/Commit knoppen.
components.technical: App.tsx (Mode: SETTINGS). Gebruikt Web Storage en startup(true) for sync. Supports manual Storage Folder change.

components.design: Automatisch proces: optionele Border -> optionele Stamp -> DNA -> Anchor -> Zip.
components.technical: App.tsx (runOneClickShield). In-page UID input; sequential processing ensuring border-stamp consistency.

components.design: Verifieert alle forensische lagen; intelligente herkenning van ontbrekende lagen.
components.technical: ZipVerifier.tsx. Uses 2% noise tolerance; reads deed.json 'features' to determine which scans are mandatory.

components.design: Veilige bestandstoegang op Android; standaard Documents/_PhotoVerify locatie.
components.technical: NativeBridgePlugin.java + MainActivity.java. Re-activated UUID Forced identity to bypass caching.

components.design: Ontvangt foto's en ZIP's; automatische wizard selectie met cold-start retry logica.
Technisch toezicht op build integriteit en efficiëntie.
components.technical: scripts/validate_repo.py + incremental check logic. Aborts if no changes are detected since last build.

components.design: Gegarandeerde synchronisatie tussen broncode en APK.
components.technical: Deep purge van dist/ en build/ mappen + UUID identity per build.

config_files.purpose: Theming, platform-specific UI constants, and branding URLs.
All UI text, titles, descriptions, and feature naming.
Single source for the current version number (1.2.6).

version_history.feature: Final Sync Milestone: Solved persistent v1.0.5 cache issue via deep purge and UUID forced identity.
Enhanced Licensing: Added Device Owner, User/Org details, and Grace Period to About screen. Default Documents storage.
Consolidated Release with UUID-Forced ID to ensure clean install.
